insights.summary: Most critical issue: Eye Strain Index exceeds 50% Current eye health: At risk of ocular fatigue Recommended action: Implement measures to reduce screen time and improve workplace ergonomics
insights.improvements: Eye strain index: Reduce eye strain by 2.7% (48.5% to 45.8%) Blink rate: Increase blink rate to 15 blinks/min (up from 13.2 blinks/min) Screen distance: Maintain screen distance within healthy range (50-70 cm) Posture score: Improve posture score by 12.5% (72.5% to 85%) Ambient brightness: Maintain ambient brightness within a healthy range (100-180)
tips: Adopt the 20-20-20 rule: Every 20 minutes, look away from screen and focus on something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.
Position your monitor to ensure your head is in line with the top third of the screen.
Limit screen time and use eye care software to track and remind you to take regular breaks.
Apply the 50-50-10 rule: Allocate 50% of your space for a comfortable workspace, 50% for digital equipment, and 10% for non-screen activities.
